overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character walking along rural railroad tracks at night. A steam train passes by in the opposite direction, creating a dramatic moment before the character continues exploring the prairie landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railroad corridor through prairie grassland

events.description: steam locomotive with bright headlight becomes visible approaching in the distance along the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel railroad bed, moving toward the approaching train

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive approaching on the tracks with headlight glowing and smoke stack billowing dark smoke

entered.detail: gravel railroad bed with steel tracks running parallel to the path
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires running alongside the tracks
large flat-topped rock formation rising above the prairie horizon
expansive grassland stretching to the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gravel railroad bed through open prairie land at night. Telegraph poles line the left side while distant mesa formations rise against the cloudy sky. A steam train's headlight appears in the distance, approaching along the tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: active railway with passing steam train

events.description: massive steam locomotive passes extremely close to the character, temporarily blocking the view of the landscape ahead
long freight train with multiple dark boxcars continues passing by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: stepping slightly aside to let the train pass while observing the massive locomotive

notable_agents.action: massive black steam locomotive passing by with glowing firebox, bright headlamp, and billowing smoke
freight boxcars moving past on the tracks, some with visible red marker lights

entered.detail: large black steam engine with cowcatcher, headlamp, and smokestack emitting thick dark smoke
dark wooden boxcars with sliding doors passing by in succession

segments.scene_description: The steam train thunders past the character, creating a dramatic occlusion as the massive locomotive and boxcars fill the frame. The character steps aside onto the grassy verge as the train passes, with the locomotive's firebox glowing and smoke billowing into the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail parallel to railroad tracks

events.description: character moves from gravel railroad bed onto grassy dirt path beside the tracks after the train passes

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt trail parallel to the tracks, moving through grassy terrain and observing the open landscape

entered.detail: narrow dirt path through tall grass running parallel to the railroad tracks
low leafy bushes growing alongside the gravel railroad bed

segments.scene_description: After the train passes, the character continues walking along a dirt trail through the prairie grass, moving parallel to the railroad tracks. The landscape opens up again with mesa formations visible in the distance, telegraph poles continuing along the route, and the night sky filled with clouds above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a nighttime prairie railroad that is momentarily interrupted by the thunderous passage of a steam train. It begins with the character walking along a gravel railroad bed lined with telegraph poles, while a distant headlight emerges from the darkness beneath a cloudy sky. As the train arrives, the massive locomotive and boxcars surge forward to fill the frame, forcing the character onto the grassy verge amidst billowing smoke and the glow of the firebox. The scene then opens back up as the train recedes, shifting the focus to a dirt trail that runs parallel to the tracks. Finally, the camera continues forward through the prairie grass, moving toward distant mesa formations under the expansive night sky.
